matrix.name: PE (polyethylene)
matrix.description: Polyethylene matrix. Low permittivity, non-magnetic, lightweight.

magnetic_absorber.name: Nd0.15-BaM
magnetic_absorber.description: Nd-doped barium ferrite (BaNd0.15Fe11.85O19). Provides both dielectric and magnetic loss via natural resonance and eddy current effects.

conductive_filler.name: CNTs (8wt%)
conductive_filler.description: Carbon nanotubes at 8wt% loading. High dielectric loss from conductive network formation. Based on Nd0.15-BaM/8%CNTs composite data.

lightweight_magnetic.name: Hollow Nd-BaM microspheres
lightweight_magnetic.description: Hollow Nd-doped barium ferrite microspheres. Reduced density compared to solid Nd-BaM while retaining moderate magnetic loss.

_notes.data_source: Electromagnetic parameters derived from VNA measurements in Wang et al., Materials 2024, 17, 3433 (CNTs@Nd0.15-BaM/PE composites, 8.2-18 GHz).
_notes.sign_convention: eps_r = eps_real - j*eps_imag (negative imaginary part). Same for permeability.
_notes.mixing_rule: Linear volume-fraction mixing. Simplified first-order approximation.
_notes.electromagnetic_parameters: All values are frequency-independent constant approximations averaged over the 8.2-18 GHz range.
